title: Histamine allergies
script_summary: Exploring the science behind histamine allergies and their effects.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about histamine allergies.
Histamine, a chemical in your body, plays a role in allergic reactions.
But did you know not everyone allergic to histamine is intolerant? It's not that simple.
Research shows histamine allergies can trigger symptoms like headaches and skin reactions.
Emerging studies suggest it might not just be diet causing issues.
Want to dive deeper into the science of allergies? Follow for more!
